query: List all segment audiences connected to the destination named 'Lives on West Coast', showing audienceId, name, totalProfiles, createdTime, updatedTime, and used in other audience count for each audience. Remove any row limit from the results.

trace.sql: SELECT s.SEGMENTID AS audienceId, s.NAME AS name, s.TOTALMEMBERS AS totalProfiles, s.CREATEDTIME AS createdTime, s.UPDATEDTIME AS updatedTime, COUNT(dep.DEPENDENTSEGMENTID) AS used_in_other_audience_count FROM dim_segment s JOIN hkg_br_segment_target st ON s.SEGMENTID = st.SEGMENTID JOIN dim_target t ON st.TARGETID = t.TARGETID LEFT JOIN hkg_br_base_segment_used_by_dependent_segment dep ON s.SEGMENTID = dep.SEGMENTID WHERE t.NAME = 'Lives on West Coast' OR t.DATAFLOWNAME = 'Lives on West Coast' GROUP BY s.SEGMENTID, s.NAME, s.TOTALMEMBERS, s.CREATEDTIME, s.UPDATEDTIME
warnings: Skipped hkg_br_property_property.parquet: Invalid Input Error: Failed to read Parquet file 'DBSnapshot/hkg_br_property_property.parquet': Need at least one non-root column in the file

trace.sql: SELECT TARGETID, NAME, DATAFLOWNAME FROM dim_target WHERE LOWER(NAME) LIKE '%west coast%' OR LOWER(DATAFLOWNAME) LIKE '%west coast%'
warnings: Skipped hkg_br_property_property.parquet: Invalid Input Error: Failed to read Parquet file 'DBSnapshot/hkg_br_property_property.parquet': Need at least one non-root column in the file

children.name: Very High Loyalty Enrollment Target — Apr16v7

children.description: Has both color preference and advisor ID set. Tests IS NOT NULL on two different field groups.

children.description: Profiles who prefer size M or L clothing. Tests prefSize with IN list.

children.description: Profiles with average order value above 150. Tests recentOrderAmountAvg numeric field.

children.description: Profiles who redeemed more than 2 offers in the last 6 months. Tests offersRedeemedLast6Months field.

children.description: Gold members with more than 3 YTD orders. Tests ordersYTD numeric + tier equality together.
